assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, a phone number for verification or test delivery, and Node.js with npm if using the CLI route.
No Sinch account, project, access key, Conversation app, or rented number exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Sinch Build account and reach the earliest official first outbound SMS success.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved between CLI-sent SMS to the developer's phone and Conversation API getting-started send after dashboard channel setup.
first_success.observable_signal: Either the destination phone receives the SMS and the CLI prints a send result, or the Conversation API accepts a messages:send request.

route_selection.surface: Sinch Build Dashboard with Conversation API or Sinch CLI quickstarts
route_selection.rule: Compare complete official routes to first outbound SMS; do not invent a winner when signup is opaque and CLI versus dashboard Conversation routes differ in billing and setup.

candidates.name: Sinch CLI quickstart: auth, rent number, conversation send
candidates.reason: Official CLI quickstart terminates on a rented number and SMS to the developer's phone, and renting implies number cost.

candidates.name: Conversation API getting started: access, app, SMS channel, HTTP send
candidates.reason: Dashboard Conversation docs require product terms, access keys, app creation, and SMS channel setup before messages:send.

required_path.action: Sign up for a free Sinch Build Dashboard account.

required_fields.label: Signup and Sinch ID verification fields
required_fields.notes: Community articles mention mobile verification for testing and 2FA, but the live signup form sequence is not fully public.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can sign in to the Sinch Build Dashboard.

required_path.action: Accept Conversation API terms if required and create an access key, recording key ID, secret, and project ID.
required_path.observable_result: Project ID, access key, and secret are available for API or CLI auth.

required_path.action: Complete the unresolved CLI or Conversation API send route through first outbound SMS.

required_fields.label: Route-specific number, app, channel, and send steps

required_path.observable_result: Depends on the unresolved first-SMS route.

prerequisites.description: Conversation API access on Sinch Build requires reviewing and accepting product terms.
CLI auth requires Project ID, Key ID, and Key Secret from the dashboard.

external_gates.description: Renting an SMS-capable number on the CLI route incurs a documented monthly number cost.

unavoidable_waits.description: Phone verification during signup or delivery of the first SMS to a real handset is asynchronous.

platform_outcomes.description: Sinch creates an account and user that can access the Build Dashboard after signup.

excluded.item: Reading Conversation API or CLI documentation
excluded.reason: Documentation reading is not a counted developer action.

excluded.item: Additional channels, templates, OAuth production auth, and inbound callbacks
excluded.reason: These occur after the first outbound SMS success.

sources.title: Sinch Build Dashboard signup
evidence_supported: Official signup entry; interactive continuation not fully public

sources.title: Creating an account on the Sinch Build Dashboard
evidence_supported: Signup creates Sinch account and user for Dashboard access

sources.title: Sinch Build Dashboard Authentication
evidence_supported: Phone verification and two-factor authentication context for Build Dashboard

uncertainties.question: Which official first-SMS route is canonical: Sinch CLI with number rental, or Conversation API dashboard plus HTTP send?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts, billing gates, and whether a Conversation app and channel setup are required all change.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A workshop-owner product choice plus a fresh-account comparison of both complete routes to first received SMS.

uncertainties.question: What exact Sinch ID signup fields, phone verification, and post-submit states appear before Dashboard access?
uncertainties.impact: The account segment cannot be reconstructed or counted from public docs alone.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of dashboard.sinch.com/signup through first authenticated Dashboard session.
